focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the information and techniques needed to diagnose and treat human injuries, diseases, and deformities.
comments: Medical knowledge outside WIDAI scope. WIDAI covers healthcare data compliance (HIPAA) but not medical practice itself. No gap.
